objective: Add a docstring to `glitchlab/cli.py::version_callback` describing the `--version` eager callback behavior and `typer.Exit` flow.

plan_steps.description: Add a descriptive docstring directly under `version_callback` in `glitchlab/cli.py` at the `def version_callback(value: bool):` definition found on line 51, documenting that Typer invokes it eagerly for the `--version` option, that `value` reflects whether the flag was provided, and that it prints the version then raises `typer.Exit()` as a side effect without changing any CLI wiring or logic.
